description: Host contacted 173.223.31.18:443 6 times in 10 minutes. Regular interval connections suggest malware beaconing.
recommended_action:
Investigate process making connections to 173.223.31.18. Consider blocking outbound:
  netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="FLARE-BLOCK-173.223.31.18" dir=out action=block remoteip=173.223.31.18

description: 185.220.101.45 probed 8 distinct usernames in the last 10 minutes. Likely enumerating valid accounts before brute force.
recommended_action:
Monitor 185.220.101.45 closely. Consider blocking if brute force follows.
  netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="FLARE-BLOCK-185.220.101.45" dir=in action=block remoteip=185.220.101.45

description: Process 'certutil.exe' executed by 'rehan'. Commonly used to download or execute malicious payloads.
recommended_action: Investigate what 'certutil.exe' was invoked with. Check command line arguments in Sysmon logs if available.

description: Process 'mshta.exe' executed by 'rehan'. Commonly used to download or execute malicious payloads.
recommended_action: Investigate what 'mshta.exe' was invoked with. Check command line arguments in Sysmon logs if available.

description: Process 'bitsadmin.exe' executed by 'rehan'. Commonly used to download or execute malicious payloads.
recommended_action: Investigate what 'bitsadmin.exe' was invoked with. Check command line arguments in Sysmon logs if available.

description: 'cmd.exe' spawned by user 'rehan'. User had 8 prior failed logon(s) — possible unauthorized access.
recommended_action: Verify if 'rehan' should be running 'cmd.exe'. Check parent process and command line arguments.

description: 'powershell.exe' spawned by user 'rehan'. User had 8 prior failed logon(s) — possible unauthorized access.
recommended_action: Verify if 'rehan' should be running 'powershell.exe'. Check parent process and command line arguments.

description: 'wmic.exe' spawned by user 'rehan'. User had 8 prior failed logon(s) — possible unauthorized access.
recommended_action: Verify if 'rehan' should be running 'wmic.exe'. Check parent process and command line arguments.

description: 185.220.101.45 made 45 failed logon attempts in 10 minutes. Attack ongoing.
recommended_action:
Block 185.220.101.45 immediately.
  netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="FLARE-BLOCK-185.220.101.45" dir=in action=block remoteip=185.220.101.45

description: 185.220.101.45 attempted logins against 8 distinct devices in 10 minutes. Classic horizontal password spray pattern.
recommended_action:
Block 185.220.101.45 at the firewall immediately.
  netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="FLARE-BLOCK-185.220.101.45" dir=in action=block remoteip=185.220.101.45

description: New user account 'svc_update' was created. Could indicate attacker establishing persistence.
recommended_action:
Verify if account 'svc_update' was created legitimately. If unknown, disable immediately:
  net user svc_update /active:no

description: Newly created account 'svc_update' was immediately granted special privileges (4672). Strong indicator of backdoor account creation.
recommended_action:
Disable account 'svc_update' immediately and investigate:
  net user svc_update /active:no

description: Connection to 10.10.10.99:1234 detected. Port 1234 is commonly used by C2 frameworks (Metasploit, Cobalt Strike, etc).
recommended_action:
Block outbound traffic to 10.10.10.99.
  netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="FLARE-BLOCK-10.10.10.99" dir=out action=block remoteip=10.10.10.99

description: Previously disabled account 'flare_test_backdoor' was re-enabled. Attackers often re-enable dormant accounts to avoid detection from new account creation alerts.
recommended_action:
Verify if 'flare_test_backdoor' should be active. If unexpected, disable again immediately:
  net user flare_test_backdoor /active:no

description: Password forced reset (4724) on account 'flare_test_backdoor'. Account was recently created — possible backdoor credential setup.
recommended_action:
Confirm 'flare_test_backdoor' initiated this reset. If unexpected, disable account:
  net user flare_test_backdoor /active:no

attack_type: Backdoor Account — Added to Privileged Group
description: Account 'Users' was added to a privileged group 'N/A'. Verify this change was authorised.
recommended_action:
Review group membership for 'Users':
  net user Users
Remove from group if unauthorised:
  net localgroup N/A Users /delete

attack_type: Backdoor Account — Added to Privileged Group
description: Account 'Administrators' was added to a privileged group 'N/A'. Verify this change was authorised.
recommended_action:
Review group membership for 'Administrators':
  net user Administrators
Remove from group if unauthorised:
  net localgroup N/A Administrators /delete

recommended_action:
Investigate and disable if unauthorised:

  net user flare_test_backdoor /active:no

description: IP 34.107.243.93 has an AbuseIPDB confidence score of 68/100. Reported as malicious by the threat intelligence community.
recommended_action:
Block traffic to/from 34.107.243.93:
